title: What Is AI Pair Programming? AI Coding Tools for Developers
summary: IBM Technology explains AI pair programming as a workflow where AI assists developers in coding tasks. The video covers how AI tools enhance debugging, code review, and overall developer productivity through real-world examples.
writeup: This IBM Technology video defines AI pair programming as a workflow in which AI tools assist developers across coding tasks. It walks through how those tools support debugging, code review, and code generation, with real-world examples drawn from natural language programming. The takeaway is a concrete picture of where AI fits into the development loop and how it affects overall developer productivity.
